RuntimeLimits.description: Hard host limits covering operations, result pages, and detached blobs.

RuntimeCapabilityManifest.description: Only runtime operations backed by explicit typed host implementations may be enabled.

RuntimeCursorBinding.description: Wire shape for an opaque cursor. Schema validation does not authenticate a cursor; Runtime must require an exact match to a trusted issued binding before use.

AuthoringProof.description: A preview/commit equality precondition, not a grant token.

RuntimeOperationBatch.description: The complete committed Engine operation input. Runtime validates document/base/hash identity but delegates all fine-grained precondition and semantic interpretation to Engine Workbench.

OperationResult.description: result_digest is SHA-256 over canonical JSON of every OperationResult field except result_digest itself.

PreviewEvaluation.description: One completed Engine preview and Access evaluation. The pair is closed so neither value can be asserted alone.

RuntimeCommitResult.description: preview_evaluation is present only after Engine preview and Access evaluation complete; pre-preview terminal rejections omit it.

LocalDocumentSource.description: An explicit local-host source selector. Runtime core ignores this field; layerdraw-host maps it mechanically to the localdocument lifecycle.
